title: Angorkis gracilis
uses: Angorkis gracilis is reportedly used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, where it is believed to possess various health benefits. The plant's leaves are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It is used to treat various ailments, including fever, headaches, and skin conditions. Additionally, Angorkis gracilis is believed to have antimicrobial properties, which may help to prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal properties of Angorkis gracilis and its potential uses.
